'''Tteel Kkak''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]. He discovered the wreck of [[Grizzid]]'s ship, and reported the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] contained within to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] lieutenants [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and [[Bidlo Kwerve/Legends|Bidlo Kwerve]].
